---
name: Architecture proposal
about: Propose a significant architectural change
title: "docs(adr): "
labels: architecture
assignees: ""
---

# Summary

Describe the architectural change being proposed.

# Problem

What limitation, risk or missing capability does this address?

# Proposal

Describe the proposed solution.

# Alternatives Considered

List relevant alternatives and why they were not chosen.

# Impact

Describe affected packages, public APIs, dependency rules and documentation.

# ADR Required

Does this require an Architecture Decision Record?

* [ ] Yes
* [ ] No
